products.title: Velvet Lip Balm
products.description: A luxurious lip balm that melts effortlessly into the lips, delivering deep hydration and lasting softness with a smooth, velvety finish.

products.title: Rose Glow
products.description: A soft rosy pink gloss that leaves lips naturally radiant and hydrated.

products.title: Cherry Crush
products.description: A vibrant cherry pink gloss with rich color and a glass-like shine.

products.title: Pink Metal
products.description: A soft pink gloss with delicate shimmer for a luminous, glossy finish.

products.title: Marshmallow Silk
products.description: A nourishing leave-in mist that hydrates, smooths, and protects your hair without weighing it down. Finished with a soft marshmallow scent you’ll want to wear every day.
